reviewer.notes: Project-level editorial review of all 15 findings. Not a claim-by-claim audit — an assessment of citability and public trustworthiness.

overall_assessment: The site is worth citing for large computations, datasets, kernels, and numerical experiments. It is not yet safe to cite as authority for major new proofs or theorem-level closure, especially around the Zaremba transitivity and A=5 proof-framework claims. Best understood as an open computational lab notebook, not a source of settled mathematical claims.

unsafe: should not be treated as established

followup_corrections_accepted: Transitivity page was substantially rewritten after o3-pro review — addresses specific logic errors, though still not formalized
Proof framework rho_eta now arb-certified (not just FP64) — acknowledged as genuine upgrade
Spectral gaps N=15 accuracy caveat now present on the page — reviewer agreed this was important
H1 contradiction (Computer-Assisted Proof vs Proof Framework) — caught by reviewer, fixed
